hypothesis: If diffusion-model generated crystal structures trained on MP and OQMD and subjected to DFT relaxation yield low RMSD relative to their initial coordinates, favorable SUN stability/novelty scores, and small energy above hull within the ≤64-atom, formation energy <0.1 eV/atom regime, then diffusion models can reliably generate thermodynamically feasible, diverse, and valid materials, as proven by the framework's DFT-based metrics.
